apps.name: Nuvio Enhanced
apps.versionDescription:
# 🚀 Release v0.3.0

## Upstream changelog:
- fix(player): update sourceStreamsState to use mutableStateOf @tapframe
- fix(player): make forced subtitle selection audio-aware @tapframe
- fix(player): enforce preferred-language subtitle filtering @tapframe
- fix(player): match forced subtitles to language preferences @tapframe
- feat: add show catalog type option @tapframe
- fix: show player streams progressively @tapframe
- fix: preserve download metadata and nav layout @tapframe
- fix: bound generic Android raw responses @tapframe
- feat(player): match overlays to TV UI @tapframe
- fix(trakt): invalidate rejected refresh tokens @tapframe
- Update AppLanguage.kt @haveAnIssue
- Create strings.xml @haveAnIssue
- feat: modern floating pill navigation bar with scroll-responsive labels @skoruppa
- Fix episode release date handling @Laskco
- fix(ios): restore back gesture and navigation @luqmanfadlli
- fix: fix collection keys duplication causing SIGSEGV @tapframe
- fix(ios): hide NavBar overlay obstructing collection folder header @luqmanfadlli
- perf: optimize metadata screen scrolling @tapframe
- feat: reveal spoiler comments by tapping @tapframe
- feat: hero overscroll @tapframe
- feat: add hero auto rotation @tapframe
- Refine iOS sheets and ratings @tapframe
- Fix metadata rail scrolling @tapframe
- Show watched checkmark on player episode list rows @neerajlovecyber
- fix(ios): stabilize profile switcher menu @WhiteGiso
- feat(details): support behaviorHints.defaultVideoId for series initial play @kgenovz
- fix(cloud): guarantee an error message for failed Torbox responses @anikettuli
- fix: stop truncating raw HTTP bodies on Android so Torbox cloud library loads @anikettuli

## Enhanced changelog:
- All changes from the upstream
- Fixed empty Live TV logo on Now Playing control @luqmanfadlli
- Added option to enable/disable Live TV @luqmanfadlli
- Disabled Live TV when there's no configured m3u playlist @luqmanfadlli
- iOS: fixed back navigation gesture @luqmanfadlli
- Android: restore PiP playback control @luqmanfadlli
---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is built from the official source without any modifications or additions.

AltStore/SideStore source:
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioFull.json
```

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository. This is not the same Nuvio Enhanced by yesnt10.

AltStore/SideStore source:
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioEnhanced.json
```

**Added Features:**
* Added a volume boost feature (up to 200%) for quieter streams (volume up gesture can go beyond 100%).
* Added support for Live TV integrations.
* Added stream quality selection in Player Control.
* Added artwork type selection for Hero background.
* Added Trakt alternative auth method to support LiveContainer user.
* Relocated Trakt configuratzion into the Integrations Settings menu.
* Added experimental PiP for iOS and iPadOS.
* Added Tap-to-Seek (you can tap on player progress bar to seek forward/backward).
* Added in-app debug logs (go to Settings -> Advanced -> Debug Logs).
* Changed the "Play" button to "Watch Again" for already-watched movies to improve tracking clarity.
* Added Library Calendar.
* Added playback info button.
* Changed Library layout to Grid View.
* Added adaptive hide/unhide Liquid Glass NavBar on scroll. 

**Bug Fixes:**
* iOS: Fixed animated GIF support for Profile Avatars.
* iOS: Fixed animated GIF support for Stream Badge.
* iOS: Fixed Collection NavBar obstructing catalog filters
* Fixed status bar visibility

---
### PiP is back for iOS and iPadOS
It's still experimental and can be changed or removed in the future.
Enable it in the Settings -> Playback.
HDR is tone mapped when this option is enabled.


---

> **💡 Note for iOS Users:**
Since Nuvio embeds heavy media frameworks, sideloading tools like AltStore, SideStore, or Sideloadly have to manually re-sign thousands of internal components with your Apple ID certificate. If the installation progress bar looks stuck, please don't close it! Just give it a few minutes to process the signing in the background, and it will install successfully. Use cable connection to speed-up sideloading process.

> **💡 Note for Android Users:** Unsigned debug APKs are included in the assets below if you want to test the Enhanced features on Android. You may not able to install this apk because it's unsigned.
apps.localizedDescription: Nuvio Enhanced includes exclusive experimental features, volume boosting, and performance fixes not available in the upstream build.

apps.localizedDescription: Identical parity to the official TestFlight version with unlocked plugins and trailers.
